metadata.purpose: Structured clinical fields the v7 parser extracts from the question when the clinician provides patient-specific numeric or categorical information. Consumed downstream by retrieval scoring (value bonuses) and CMI matching (patient eligibility filtering). Separate from anchor_vocabulary.json, which is for lexical concept matching.
metadata.source: Derived from v6 data_dictionary.json — the structured numeric/categorical variable set.

age.notes: Extract from phrases like '78yo', '78 y/o', 'age 78', '78 year old'.

NIHSS.notes: NIH Stroke Scale. Extract from 'NIHSS 18', 'NIHSS of 18', 'NIH stroke scale 18', 'stroke scale 18'.

premorbid_mRS.notes: Pre-stroke modified Rankin Scale. Extract from 'baseline mRS 2', 'pre-morbid mRS 2', 'mRS 2 at baseline'.

ASPECTS.notes: Alberta Stroke Program Early CT Score. Extract from 'ASPECTS 7', 'ASPECTS of 7'.

core_volume_mL.notes: Infarct core volume. Extract from '35 mL core', 'core of 35 mL', 'ischemic core 35 mL'.

BP_systolic.notes: Extract from 'BP 185/100', '185 systolic', 'systolic 185'. If only a single number is given with 'SBP' or 'systolic', map to this field.

glucose_mg_dL.notes: Extract from 'glucose 45', 'blood sugar 45', 'BG 45'. Convert mmol/L to mg/dL (×18) if needed.

LKW_minutes.notes: Time since last known well. Normalize to minutes: '2 hours' → 120, '45 min' → 45, '3h 20min' → 200, 'wake up stroke / unknown time' → null with a note in clarification.

circulation.notes: Infer from vessel mentioned: MCA/ICA/M1/M2/ACA → anterior; basilar/vertebral/PCA → posterior. Do NOT infer from deficit alone.

vessel_occluded.notes: Specific occluded vessel when named. Do NOT expand to a broader category — 'M1' stays 'M1'; do not emit 'LVO' unless the clinician said LVO.

side.notes: Laterality of the occlusion or deficit. Extract when the clinician uses 'left', 'right', 'bilateral', 'L ', 'R ' (as a prefix to vessel). Do NOT infer laterality from clinical features (e.g. aphasia suggesting left) — only emit when the clinician explicitly states it.

imaging_modality.notes: Imaging modality mentioned or requested in the question.

anticoagulant_on_board.notes: Current anticoagulant. 'On a blood thinner' → DOAC_unspecified. Specific drug name → that drug.
